documents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?

chat.title: AI Chat Assistant
chat.placeholder: Ask me anything about your restaurant metrics...
chat.noMessages: Start a conversation with our AI assistant
chat.noMessagesHint: Ask questions about your business metrics, recommendations, and more
chat.greeting: 👋 Hello! I'm your SuChef AI Assistant. I can help you analyze your restaurant metrics, answer questions about profitability, and provide recommendations to improve your business. What would you like to know?

response.profit: 📊 To improve your profit margins, I recommend: 1) Review your ingredient costs regularly, 2) Analyze slow-moving items, 3) Optimize portion sizes, 4) Monitor labor costs against revenue. Would you like me to dive deeper into any of these?
response.expense: 💰 Your expenses are a key area to track. I notice from your uploads that varying costs are common. I recommend: 1) Negotiate better rates with suppliers, 2) Reduce food waste, 3) Track daily expenses consistently, 4) Compare costs month-over-month. What specific expense concerns you most?
response.order: 📈 Order tracking is crucial! To increase order volume: 1) Analyze peak hours and staffing, 2) Optimize your menu pricing, 3) Identify your best-sellers, 4) Promote high-margin items. Based on your data, have you noticed any seasonal patterns?
response.help: 🎯 I'm here to help! You can ask me about: • Profit optimization strategies • Expense reduction tips • Revenue improvement ideas • Document analysis • Business recommendations • Restaurant metrics explanation. What would you like to explore?
response.thanks: 😊 You're welcome! Feel free to ask me anything else about your restaurant business. I'm always here to help you make better decisions!
response.default: 💡 That's a great question! Based on your restaurant data, I can provide more specific insights. Could you clarify if this is about revenue, expenses, operations, or something else? Or feel free to ask about any metrics you'd like to understand better.

recommendations.title: Recommended by Industry Leaders
recommendations.sectionSubtitle: See what successful restaurants say about suChef

chef1.name: Chef Marco Rossi
chef1.quote: suChef transformed my margins overnight. The AI suggestions are incredibly accurate and have helped me optimize our menu pricing perfectly.

owner1.name: Lisa Chen
owner1.quote: Finally have time to focus on cuisine instead of spreadsheets. The automated inventory alerts saved us thousands in food waste.

chef2.name: Chef David Thompson
chef2.quote: Stock alerts alone have saved us from countless stockouts. The system is intuitive and genuinely helpful for daily operations.

owner2.name: Priya Patel
owner2.quote: The AI insights I'm getting are incredible. We've never had this level of actionable intelligence about our business before.

chef3.name: Chef Thomas Anderson
chef3.quote: Game changer for our kitchen operations. The recipe optimization feature has helped us maintain quality while reducing costs.
